{{Infobox character
| name = Lizard-man
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A lizard-man figure in dark red clothes leaped through [[Simon]]'s window.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The lizard-man has pebbled rust-red skin and a long lizard's tail.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The lizard-man's fingers are tipped by long claws.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The lizard-man wears ornate, multi-layered red clothes stitched with unknown symbols.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
